response.original_title: Oakwood College Precious Memories 1985-86 Music Video Highlights
response.overview: A rare archival gospel compilation capturing the vibrant musical life of Oakwood College during the 1985–86 school year. Recorded live across the Oakwood College and Alabama A&M University campuses, this collection showcases an extraordinary lineup of student ensembles, choirs, quartets, and soloists whose performances helped shape the legacy of Adventist gospel music.  Featuring beloved groups such as The Aeolians, A Special Blend, Alliance, Foundation, Unity, His Own, and the Blessed Peace Choir, the video highlights a wide range of spirituals, anthems, contemporary gospel selections, and traditional favorites. The program also includes appearances by celebrated baritone Wintley Phipps and the Oakwood College Choir.  Preserved and released by Black In The Day Adventist Productions, this compilation serves as a historical time capsule—celebrating African‑American Adventist musical heritage and the unforgettable “precious memories” of Oakwood’s campus worship culture.
response.title: Oakwood College Precious Memories 1985-86 Music Video Highlights
